content.problemStatement:
Given an array AAA of NNN integers and MMM queries, where each query contains a position LLL. For each query, find the number of distinct elements from position LLL to the end of the array (positions LLL to NNN).


Input Format

First line contains two space-separated integers NNN and MMM - array length and number of queries
Second line contains NNN space-separated integers A1,A2,...,ANA_1, A_2, ..., A_NA1‚Äã,A2‚Äã,...,AN‚Äã - the array elements
Third line contains MMM space-separated integers L1,L2,...,LML_1, L_2, ..., L_ML1‚Äã,L2‚Äã,...,LM‚Äã - the query positions


Output Format

Output MMM space-separated integers, where the iii-th integer represents the number of distinct elements from position LiL_iLi‚Äã to NNN

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Query 1: L = 1
Elements from position 1 to 7: [1, 2, 1, 1, 2, 2, 3] 
Distinct elements are {1, 2, 3} 
Answer = 3
Query 2: L = 2
Elements from position 2 to 7: [2, 1, 1, 2, 2, 3] 
Distinct elements are {1, 2, 3} 
Answer = 3
Query 3: L = 6
Elements from position 6 to 7: [2, 3] 
Distinct elements are {2, 3} 
Answer = 2
